name: Lead Time Percentiles (P50 / P75 / P90)
query:
SELECT
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY v_facts.value)::numeric, 1) AS p50_days,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY v_facts.value)::numeric, 1) AS p75_days,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.90) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY v_facts.value)::numeric, 1) AS p90_days
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'lead_time_days'
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{completion_date}}]]
